BackstoryDef.title: bookworm
BackstoryDef.description: Rather than socialize with the other children, [PAWN_nameDef] preferred to get lost in literature. [PAWN_pronoun] taught [PAWN_objective]self to read at an early age with the many books printed in the city states.

BackstoryDef.title: war refugee
BackstoryDef.description: War broke out in [PAWN_nameDef]'s home when [PAWN_pronoun] was a baby. [PAWN_possessive] parents fled with [PAWN_objective], seeking safety wherever they could find it. [PAWN_nameDef]'s earliest memories are of being taught how to defend [PAWN_objective]self.

BackstoryDef.title: miner
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a poor family. Unable to afford school education, [PAWN_pronoun] family sent [PAWN_nameDef] to work for a mining company.

BackstoryDef.title: spoiled brat
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a wealthy family of old-money merchants. [PAWN_pronoun] rejected the many attemps [PAWN_possessive] parents made to educate [PAWN_possessive] and instead spent most of [PAWN_possessive] days doing whatever [PAWN_pronoun] wished.

BackstoryDef.title: doctor's aid
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born during a catastrophic war. [PAWN_pronoun] grew up helping [PAWN_possessive] parents in an infirmary, treating the cascade of horrific burns from the battlefields. [PAWN_pronoun] was left with a lifelong fear of fire.

BackstoryDef.title: tinker
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a family of craftsmen and spent most of [PAWN_possessive] youth tinkering with whatever [PAWN_pronoun] could get her hands on.

BackstoryDef.title: garage kid
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] helped out in [PAWN_possessive] family's repair garage. [PAWN_pronoun] spent most of [PAWN_possessive] days tinkering with vehicles.

BackstoryDef.title: convoy kid
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a family of traveling merchants. [PAWN_pronoun] quickly learned the ins and outs of the trade and was soon helping run the family business. [PAWN_pronoun] also learned a thing or two about machinery thanks to the many aging vehicles [PAWN_possessive] family owned.

BackstoryDef.title: street rat
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was left orphaned at a young age. With no family to take care of [PAWN_possessive], [PAWN_pronoun] turned to crime.

BackstoryDef.title: timid kid
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was the victim of an unspeakable crime. As a result, [PAWN_pronoun] grew up with a deep distrust of the outside world.

BackstoryDef.title: delinquent
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a bit of a delinquent. [PAWN_pronoun] often ran with the wrong crowd and got into trouble with the law.

BackstoryDef.title: scout
BackstoryDef.description: Born to the administrators of an industrial city state, [PAWN_nameDef] was enrolled in a youth program that taught military scouting skills.\n\n[PAWN_pronoun] learned to survive in the wilderness, to obey, and not to ask questions.

BackstoryDef.title: military cadet
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ran away from [PAWN_possessive] family at a young age to become a soldier. [PAWN_pronoun] lived in barracks with soldiers, learning about duty, weapons, pain, and victory.

BackstoryDef.title: ranch kid
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born and raised on a farm not far from a city. [PAWN_pronoun] helped [PAWN_possessive] parents work the land and raise animals.

BackstoryDef.title: mercenary kid
BackstoryDef.description: Descended from a long line of mercenaries, [PAWN_nameDef] picked up the family trade. [PAWN_pronoun] was a skilled marksman and knew how to handle [PAWN_possessive]self in a fight.

BackstoryDef.title: shop kid
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s mother was often ill, and it fell to [PAWN_objective] to run the store which was their only source of income. [PAWN_pronoun] learned a little about the exotic artifacts which [PAWN_pronoun] sold, and a lot about the art of the deal.
